Author: bdg
Name: Auto Lister
Punchline: One-click bulk market listing: prices every sellable inventory item like Dagobert and puts it up for sale.
Description: Adds an 'Auto List' button next to Dagobert's 'Auto Pinch' on the retainer sell list. Clicking it goes through every marketable item in the fourth inventory bag (the bottom-right quarter), puts each up for sale, opens the price comparison, undercuts the cheapest matching HQ/NQ listing by 1 gil and confirms - until the bag has no more sellable items or the retainer's 20 sell slots are full. The price-checking logic mirrors Dagobert's auto pinch.
